unsavedChanges.title: Leave without saving?
unsavedChanges.description: You have unsaved changes on this page. If you leave now, they'll be lost.

settingsSaveBar.title: Unsaved changes
settingsSaveBar.hint: Don't forget to save before leaving the page.

settingsScopeBanner.personalDescription: Changes here only affect your account. Other team members keep their own preferences.
settingsScopeBanner.orgDescription: Changes here apply to every member of your workspace. Only admins can edit these.

brandingCard.logoDescription: Used in the opdrachtformulier header and on the team detail page.
brandingCard.logoConstraints: PNG, JPG, WebP or GIF — max {max} MB.
brandingCard.signatureDescription: Stamped into the signature box on the opdrachtformulier PDF. PNG with a transparent background renders cleanest.
brandingCard.signatureConstraints: PNG or JPG — max {max} MB. SVG not supported — PDFs stamp raster.

legalBillingFields.title: Legal & billing
legalBillingFields.intro: Used on issued invoices and the assignment form. Optional now, but needed before billing.
legalBillingFields.soleTraderDescription: Eenmanszaak — invoices issued under personal name.
legalBillingFields.companyDescription: BV / SRL or other legal entity.
legalBillingFields.kboHint: Same digits as VAT, without the BE prefix.
legalBillingFields.ibanError: Format looks off — expected BE + 14 digits.
legalBillingFields.billingEmailHint: Where invoices and statements are sent.

legalBillingDisplay.title: Legal & billing
legalBillingDisplay.incompleteBody: Required before payouts can be issued. Add the inspector's VAT number, IBAN, and billing address.

pricingCard.title: Pricing
pricingCard.intro: Prices are snapshotted at creation — later price-list edits won't change this invoice.

announcementForm.title: Title
announcementForm.titleHint: Shown in bold on the banner
announcementForm.bodyHint: One or two short sentences work best
announcementForm.bodyPlaceholder: Describe what is happening, when, and what users should do.
announcementForm.activeDescription: Uncheck to save as a draft without publishing.
announcementForm.dismissibleDescription: Let each user close the banner for themselves. Sticky announcements can only be closed by an admin.
announcementForm.previewBodyFallback: Body text previews like this for all users in the active window.

teamForm.basicsDescription: Name, location, and the badge shown on cards across the dashboard.
teamForm.name: Team name
teamForm.badgeHint: 1–3 letters shown on team cards until a logo image is uploaded. Leave blank to derive from the team name.
teamForm.stampLogo: Stamp team logo on property photos
teamForm.stampLogoDescription: When on, the team's branding is overlaid on listing photos generated by the platform.
teamForm.legalDescription: Used on issued invoices and the opdrachtformulier. Optional now, but needed before billing.
teamForm.invoiceRecipientHint: Drives which contact block prints on invoices. Overridable per assignment.
teamForm.commissionDescription: How much the team keeps per completed assignment. Set once, applies platform-wide.

assignmentForm.servicesSubtitle: Pick one or more. We handle scheduling and delivery.
assignmentForm.odooUnreachable: Odoo is unreachable — pricelist pickers won't load. New assignments will use the team's base price as a fallback.
assignmentForm.propertySubtitle: Where is the inspection taking place?
assignmentForm.contactSubtitle: The realtor or agency person the inspector should contact. Shown on the calendar event under "Makelaar".
assignmentForm.ownerSubtitle: The person signing the assignment form.
assignmentForm.tenantSubtitle: Add if the property is currently occupied — optional.
assignmentForm.plannedDateHint: We confirm within 24 hours by email.
assignmentForm.keyPickup: A key needs to be picked up before the inspection
assignmentForm.keyPickupWhere: Where is the key picked up?
assignmentForm.keyPickupAddressHint: Full address where the inspector can pick up the key.
assignmentForm.freelancerHint: Optional — leave as Unassigned to assign later.
assignmentForm.calendarDateHint: Overrides the planned date when pushing to calendars. Customer's date stays untouched.
assignmentForm.calendarAccountHint: The Google account the email's 'Add to my calendar' button targets.
assignmentForm.notesPlaceholder: Parking, access codes, pets — anything worth knowing.
assignmentForm.initialCommentPlaceholder: First message for the thread (optional) — visible to everyone on the assignment.
assignmentForm.filesSubtitle: Attach floor plans, photos, or notes the inspector should see. You can also add files later from the Files tab.
assignmentForm.filesHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP · up to {maxMB} MB each · up to {maxFiles} files
assignmentForm.filesLabel: Drop floor plans, photos or notes
assignmentForm.filesReady: {count, plural, one {# file ready to upload.} other {# files ready to upload.}}

emptyMatching.title: No matching assignments
emptyMatching.description: Try broadening the filters — or reset to see all.

admin.title: No assignments yet
admin.description: Create your first property inspection to get started.

staff.title: No assignments yet
staff.description: Create your first property inspection to get started.

realtor.title: No certificate orders yet for your team
realtor.description: Click New assignment to order your team's first certificate.

freelancer.title: No inspections assigned to you yet
freelancer.description: Once a realtor assigns you to an inspection, it shows up here.

detail.deliverablesDescription: Certificate PDFs and photos from the assigned inspector.
detail.deliverablesEmpty: The inspector hasn't uploaded a deliverable yet.
detail.realtorUploadsDescription: Floor plans, access notes, photos provided by the agency.
detail.uploadsClosedNotice: This assignment is no longer active. Uploads and deletions are closed.
detail.commentsEmpty: No comments yet. Start the conversation.
detail.commissionDescription: Applied at completion. Snapshotted — retroactive rate changes don't rewrite this line.

timeAgo.days: {n, plural, =1 {1 day ago} other {# days ago}}

freelancerEditForm.plannedDateHint: Set or change the appointment date. Saving with a date promotes an awaiting assignment to scheduled; clearing it on a scheduled row reverts to awaiting.

completeForm.title: Complete {reference}
completeForm.description: Wrap up the inspection and move this assignment out of the active queue.
completeForm.notesHint: Posts as a comment on the assignment. Optional.
completeForm.notesPlaceholder: Everything went smoothly. Owner was on site, access was fine.
completeForm.finishedAtHint: Date and time the on-site work wrapped up.

actions.cancelDialogDescription: Cancelled assignments can no longer be edited. This will be visible in the team's activity log.
actions.cancelReasonHint: Posts as a comment on the assignment so the team has context.
actions.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Owner changed their mind, duplicate order, etc.

delete.title: Delete {reference}?
delete.description: The assignment, its files, comments, and calendar events all go. Commission lines and invoices tied to it are removed as well. This can't be undone.

keyPickup.label: Key pickup
keyPickup.checkboxLabel: A key needs to be picked up

assignedTo.title: Assigned to
assignedTo.noServices: Pick at least one service in the form — an assignment row will appear here for each.
assignedTo.searchPlaceholder: Type a name, region, or email…

reassign.description: They'll see this assignment appear in their inspections list.
reassign.outOfScopeWarning: The current freelancer is no longer in your team's roster. Saving will reassign to whoever you pick below.
reassign.rosterEmpty: No freelancers are in your team's roster yet. Invite one from the Users page first.

files.labelFreelancer: Drop certificate PDF(s) or click to upload
files.labelRealtor: Drop floor plans, photos or notes
files.filesFailedFallback: One or more files failed to upload.
files.acceptHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP · up to {maxMB} MB each · up to {maxFiles} files per upload

notices.filesFailed: Assignment created. Some files failed to upload — try again from the Files tab.

empty.title: No announcements yet
empty.description: Publish a banner to let everyone on the platform know about updates, maintenance, or new features.

delete.title: Delete "{title}"?
delete.description: The announcement disappears for everyone. Per-user dismissals are cleared too. This cannot be undone.

new.title: New announcement
new.subtitle: Create a banner message for users

topbar.title: Contact messages
topbar.subtitleEmpty: Visitor submissions from the public /contact form will land here.

empty.title: No messages yet
empty.description: When someone submits the contact form on immoplatform.be, the message will show up here.
empty.inboxZeroDescription: Every message has been handled. Switch to All to see the full history.

notes.label: Internal notes
notes.placeholder: Anything the team should know about this lead…

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.description: Mutations across the platform will stream into this log as they happen.

index.heading: Email templates
index.description: Review how each transactional / lifecycle email renders. Edit the JSON props to see how the template handles different inputs. Admin only.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.description: Services this inspector is certified to perform.

recentWork.title: Recent work
recentWork.emptyAdminStaff: Admin & staff accounts don't carry assignments directly.
recentWork.emptyDefault: No assignments linked to this user yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Changing the email does not re-verify it — trusted admin update.
profile.roleHint: Controls what this person can access across the platform.

passwordReset.title: Reset password
passwordReset.description: Sets a new password for this user. Every active session is revoked so the old password stops working immediately. The user is not emailed — share the new password out-of-band.
passwordReset.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters including a letter and a number.
passwordReset.success: Password reset. Other sessions signed out.

delete.confirmDescription: The account is soft-deleted — they can no longer sign in and every active session is revoked. Assignments and comments they created stay in place, attributed to their name.

invite.topbarSubtitle: Send an email invite to join your workspace

needTeamFirst.title: You need to own a team before you can invite anyone
needTeamFirst.body: Realtors can only invite people into teams they own. You're not an owner of any team yet — ask your agency admin to transfer ownership to you, or create a new team.

whoCard.title: Who are you inviting?
whoCard.description: We'll email them a secure link to create their account.
whoCard.noteHint: Shown on the accept-invite page. Nice for context.
whoCard.notePlaceholder: Hi Lucas — welcome to our immoplatform workspace.

roleCard.title: Role
roleCard.description: Determines what they can see and do on the platform.

realtor.label: Realtor
realtor.description: Creates assignments, tracks their agency's work, invites teammates.

freelancer.label: Freelancer
freelancer.description: Certified inspector — accepts assignments and uploads deliverables.

staff.label: Staff
staff.description: immoplatform support — can view all teams and help users.

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Full platform access — billing, price lists, user management.

teamCard.title: Team
teamCard.descriptionLocked: Inviting into {teamName}. Open the invite from the Users page if you need to pick a different team.
teamCard.descriptionLockedFallback: Inviting into this team. Open the invite from the Users page if you need to pick a different team.
teamCard.descriptionRealtor: Attach this realtor to an agency team.
teamCard.descriptionFreelancer: Attach this freelancer to a team they regularly work with.
teamCard.teamSearchPlaceholder: Type a team name or city…

member.label: Member
member.description: Can create and see assignments for the team.

owner.label: Owner
owner.description: Member + can invite, edit team settings & remove others.

teamCard.ownerTakenExplain: {ownerName} already owns {teamName}. New invites can only join as members. To change the owner, transfer ownership first from the team settings.

preview.title: Preview email
preview.subject: You're invited to join <brand></brand>
preview.bodyWithTeam: You've been invited to join as a {role} on team {team} ({teamRole}).
preview.bodyWithoutTeam: You've been invited to join as a {role}.

row.confirmDescription: They won't be able to use the accept link anymore. Sending a fresh invite is still possible afterwards.

founderBanner.titleFromGate: You need a team before you can use that section.
founderBanner.titleDefault: Your agency isn't set up yet.
founderBanner.bodyCanFound: Create your office to get started — you can invite teammates and order certificates afterwards.
founderBanner.bodyCannotFound: Ask an administrator to create your office, or contact support if you're a new agency owner.

list.headline: {count, plural, one {# partner office} other {# partner offices}} across Belgium
list.searchPlaceholder: Search by team name, city or owner…

empty.noMatchDescription: Nothing found for "{query}". Try a different name, city, or owner.
empty.noTeamsDescription: Create your first agency office. You'll be able to add members, set commission rules and order certificates on their behalf.

overview.recentDescription: Latest work carried out for this team.
overview.emptyAssignments: No assignments yet for this team.

members.title: Members
members.summary: {count, plural, one {# person has} other {# people have}} access to this team.
members.empty: No members yet. Invite someone to get started.
members.pendingSummary: {count, plural, one {# invite} other {# invites}} awaiting acceptance

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.description: All work carried out for this team.

billing.title: Billing & legal
billing.description: Legal entity details for invoices issued to and from this team.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Anything worth remembering about this team — primary contact, scheduling quirks, …

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Logo and signature used on PDF certificates issued on behalf of this team.
branding.logoHint: Shown on dashboards, assignments, and team cards.
branding.signatureHint: Stamped on certificates and signed assignment forms.

services.title: Services & price overrides
services.description: Per-team prices override the master price list. Leave blank to use the master price shown.

commission.title: Commission configuration
commission.descriptionPrefix: How this team is rewarded per completed assignment. Payouts are tracked on the

percentage.label: Percentage
percentage.description: A share of the assignment price.

fixed.label: Fixed amount
fixed.description: A flat fee per completed assignment.

commission.amountHintPercentage: Of the invoice total, excluding VAT.
commission.amountHintFixed: Flat euro amount per completed assignment.
commission.activityEmpty: No commission accrued yet. Lines are recorded when an assignment is marked completed.

footer.adminOnlyDelete: Only admins can delete this team.

delete.confirmDescription: Members, invites, service-price overrides, commission lines and payout history are all removed. Blocked when assignments still reference this team — delete or reassign those first.

removeMember.confirmDescription: They lose access to this team's assignments immediately. Their account and any assignments they personally created stay put.

transferOwnership.modalDescription: Pick a new owner for {team}. They'll get full edit + invite rights; you'll become a regular member.
transferOwnership.noEligible: You're the only eligible owner of this team. Invite another realtor first — once they accept, you'll be able to transfer ownership to them here.
transferOwnership.eligibleHint: Only realtors and admins who are currently members of this team appear here. Freelancer members cannot own the team.

new.topbarSubtitle: Start a new agency office. You'll become its owner.

edit.topbarSubtitle: Update agency details, billing info, pricing, and commission config.
edit.servicesDescription: Custom pricing per service. Some services bind to an Odoo pricelist; others use a fixed override price (leave blank for the base price). Existing assignments keep their snapshotted price — changes apply to new work only.

priceOverrides.odooUnreachable: Odoo is unreachable — pricelist bindings can't be loaded or changed right now. Existing bindings are still in effect.
priceOverrides.pricelistEmpty: No pricelists in Odoo (or Odoo is unreachable).
priceOverrides.itemsEmpty: No items configured in Odoo for this pricelist.

scope.appearanceDescription: Theme, density and motion preferences are stored locally in this browser for your account only.

verifyBanner.title: Verify your email address
verifyBanner.bodySuffix: . Click it to confirm the address so we can send you account notifications.
verifyBanner.sent: Verification email sent — check your inbox (and spam).

details.title: Profile
details.subtitle: Shown on comments, assignments and team pages.
details.emailHintVerified: Changing this sends a verification link to the new address.
details.emailHintUnverified: Not verified. Save to resend, or use the banner above.
details.bioHint: Optional — a short note that appears on your profile.

photo.title: Photo
photo.subtitle: Appears next to your name across the dashboard.
photo.fileHint: PNG, JPG or WebP — max {maxMb} MB.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.subtitle: Actions here can't be undone. Tread carefully.
danger.deleteBody: Permanently remove your account and personal data. This cannot be reversed. We'll ask for your password to confirm.
danger.modalDescription: This removes your profile and signs you out of every device. Assignments you created stay on the platform; your name is kept on them for history.
danger.passwordHint: We ask for your password so a stolen session can't delete your account.

password.title: Change password
password.subtitle: Use at least 8 characters including a letter and a number. Other devices will be signed out when you save.
password.saved: Password updated. Other active sessions have been signed out.
password.newHint: At least 8 characters, including a letter and a number.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.subtitle: Devices currently signed in to your account.
sessions.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
sessions.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
sessions.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}
sessions.monthsAgo: {count, plural, one {# month ago} other {# months ago}}
sessions.yearsAgo: {count, plural, one {# year ago} other {# years ago}}
sessions.revokeDescription: That device will need to sign in again next time it's used. Your current session stays signed in.

signOutAll.title: Sign out everywhere
signOutAll.body: Revoke every session except this one.
signOutAll.otherSessions: Currently {count, plural, one {1 other session} other {# other sessions}} active.
signOutAll.confirmDescription: Every device except this one will need to sign in again. Use this if you suspect your account is accessed somewhere you don't recognise.
signOutAll.signedOut: {count, plural, one {Signed out 1 other session.} other {Signed out # other sessions.}}

topbar.title: Notifications
topbar.subtitle: Control what lands in your inbox

notifications.heading: Notification preferences
notifications.intro: Pick which events send you email. Only events relevant to your role as {role} appear here.
notifications.footer: Transactional mail (invites, password resets, team adds) always sends regardless of these settings.

assignment.label: Assignments
assignment.description: Emails about the jobs you're involved in.

team.label: Teams & offices
team.description: Emails about your team and its members.

user.label: Your account
user.description: Emails about your own account activity.

assignmentCreated.label: When a new assignment is created
assignmentCreated.description: Sent to platform admins and staff when any new assignment lands.

assignmentScheduled.label: When one of my assignments is scheduled with a date
assignmentScheduled.description: Sent to the realtor and agency when a new assignment lands in the scheduled state with a planned date.

assignmentDateUpdated.label: When an assignment's scheduled date changes
assignmentDateUpdated.description: Sent to the freelancer and creator when the planned date is edited.

assignmentFreelancerAssigned.label: When I'm placed on a new assignment (or reassigned)
assignmentFreelancerAssigned.description: Sent to the freelancer on first assignment and on any reassignment.

assignmentFreelancerUnassigned.label: When I'm removed from an assignment
assignmentFreelancerUnassigned.description: Sent to the freelancer when the agency reassigns their work to someone else.

assignmentCompleted.label: When an assignment I'm on is marked completed
assignmentCompleted.description: Sent to the assigned freelancer when the agency signs off.

assignmentCancelled.label: When an assignment I'm on is cancelled
assignmentCancelled.description: Sent to the freelancer (if assigned) and the creator.

assignmentFilesUploaded.label: When files are uploaded to an assignment I'm on
assignmentFilesUploaded.description: Sent to the realtor or creator when the freelancer uploads deliverables, and to the freelancer when the realtor uploads supporting docs.

assignmentCommentPosted.label: When someone comments on an assignment I'm on
assignmentCommentPosted.description: Sent to other participants on the thread — the commenter is excluded.

teamMemberAdded.label: When I'm added to a team
teamMemberAdded.description: Sent when an admin or realtor adds you to one of their teams. Doesn't fire on first-time invite acceptance — that path uses the invite email instead.

userRegistered.label: When a new user registers on the platform
userRegistered.description: Sent to platform admins when someone completes sign-up.

density.title: Density
density.subtitle: How much content fits on one screen. Saved automatically.
density.comfortableHint: Default. Generous padding, easier to scan.
density.compactHint: Tighter rows and cards. Good for power users with lots of assignments.

motion.title: Motion & language
motion.reduceMotionHint: Disable non-essential transitions. Respects your OS setting too.
motion.highContrastHint: Stronger borders and text contrast for improved legibility.
motion.languageHint: Dashboard copy only. Full i18n lands later.

appearance.footer: Every appearance setting saves automatically as you change it.

topbar.title: Integrations
topbar.subtitle: Connect {brand} to the rest of your stack

integrations.errors: {count, plural, one {1 sync error} other {# sync errors}} across your integrations
integrations.errorsBody: Some data may be out of date. Review and retry below.
integrations.aboutBody: Org-wide integrations affect everyone on the team. Personal integrations (like your own calendar) only sync your assignments.

topbar.title: Google Calendar
topbar.subtitle: Two independent integrations — agency shared calendar and your personal one.

google.connectError: Could not complete the connection ({code}). Try again.

agency.title: Agency shared calendar
agency.subtitle: Every scheduled assignment is pushed to a single Google calendar via a service account. Subscribe to it from your own Google to see the agency pipeline.
agency.howTo: To view it personally: open Google Calendar → "Other calendars" → "+" → Subscribe to calendar → paste the id above. Or ask an admin to share it with your Google account directly.
agency.notConfiguredBody: An admin needs to set {var1}, {var2}, and {var3} in the server environment, then share the target calendar with the service-account email as "Make changes to events".

personal.title: My Google calendar
personal.subtitle: Connect your personal Google account so you can click "Add to my calendar" on an assignment and have the event land on your own schedule.
personal.notConfigured: Not configured — an admin needs to set {var1} + {var2}.
personal.expired: Your connection expired or was revoked on {date}. Reconnect to keep the "Add to my calendar" button working.

disconnect.title: Disconnect Google calendar?
disconnect.description: Future assignment events won't land on your Google calendar until you reconnect. Events you already added stay where they are.

topbar.title: Outlook / Microsoft 365
topbar.subtitle: Sync the assignments you create to your own Outlook calendar.

outlook.connectError: Could not complete the connection ({code}). Try again.

personal.title: My Outlook calendar
personal.subtitle: When you create an assignment, we push it to your personal Outlook calendar and keep it in sync with reschedules and cancellations. Nothing syncs until you connect.
personal.notConfigured: Not configured — an admin needs to set {var1} + {var2} in the server environment after registering an app in Azure.
personal.expired: Your connection expired or was revoked on {date}. Reconnect so new assignments land on your Outlook again.

disconnect.title: Disconnect Outlook calendar?
disconnect.description: Future assignment events won't sync to Outlook until you reconnect. Events already created stay on your calendar.

home.heading: Control panel
home.intro: Admin-only tools for configuring the platform, managing access and reviewing activity. Choose a section below.

priceList.title: Price list
priceList.description: Master list of services, unit prices and Odoo mapping.

users.title: User management
users.description: Invite staff, realtors and freelancers; set roles and access.

teams.title: Team management
teams.description: Partner offices, branding, members and commission rules.

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.description: Publish banner messages to the entire platform.

activity.title: Activity log
activity.description: Full audit trail of logins, mutations and status changes.

commissions.title: Commissions & payouts
commissions.description: Per-team balance, approve and mark payouts, commission rules.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Odoo sync status, calendar connections, email provider.

topbar.title: Odoo product mappings
topbar.subtitle: Per-(team, service, property type) → Odoo product name

odooProducts.intro: When an assignment is created, the sync resolves an Odoo product per service in this order: 1. the realtor's pre-pick on the create form (if the team has a pricelist binding), 2. a row here matching the assignment's team, 3. a default row (Team blank), 4. a hardcoded asbestos fallback. EPC needs at least one row here (no hardcoded fallback). Mirrors Platform v1's 3-tier lookup.

table.empty: No mappings yet. Default rows are seeded; add team-specific overrides above.

priceList.intro: Read-only view of pricelists in <db></db>. Edit in Odoo — changes refresh here within a few minutes.

byService.title: By service
byService.empty: No service revenue in this period.

byTeam.title: By team
byTeam.subtitle: Revenue, commission earned, and payouts for {period}.
byTeam.emptyDescriptionFiltered: No revenue for that team in this period. Try removing the team filter or switching period.
byTeam.emptyDescriptionDefault: Revenue is booked when an assignment reaches 'completed'. Nothing completed yet this period.

adjustments.title: Manual adjustments
adjustments.description: Journal corrections, bonuses, and deductions for {period}. Negative amounts subtract from booked revenue.
adjustments.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Late invoice settled in March
adjustments.amountHint: Use a negative number for deductions

stats.accruedSubtitle: Across {count, plural, one {# team} other {# teams}}

table.title: Teams
table.subtitle: Click a row to see the per-assignment breakdown for that team.
table.emptyDescription: Commission lines fire when an assignment reaches 'completed'. Nothing completed this quarter yet — or no completed work had an asbestos service.

breakdown.title: Breakdown
breakdown.subtitle: Every commission line for {team} in Q{quarter} {year}.

freelancer.topbarSubtitle: Your day, your jobs, your uploads

today.heading: Today's schedule
today.emptyDescription: Enjoy the breather. Upcoming inspections show here as soon as they're scheduled.

recent.heading: Recent completed
recent.emptyDescription: Assignments you mark completed show here so you can jump back to them for follow-up.

recentActivity.heading: Recent activity
recentActivity.empty: Nothing yet — activity shows up once people start working.

create.title: Create an assignment
create.body: Start a new property inspection in under 2 minutes.

invite.title: Invite a colleague
invite.body: Add people to your team so they can manage assignments too.

errorPage.headerSubtitle: Something broke while loading this view
errorPage.title: We hit a snag loading this page
errorPage.body: Your session is still active. Try reloading the section, or return to the dashboard overview.

notFoundPage.title: We couldn't find that page
notFoundPage.description: The link may be broken, or the page may have moved.
